pi_items.source: Confirmed project existence and identifier in scripts/setup_openproject.sh (projects_data array)
User details (login, name) verified in scripts/setup_openproject.sh. Expected rates (125.0, 85.0) are synthetic target values matching the explicit task instructions in task.json description.

privileged_info_summary: The environment synthesizes several projects and users via scripts/setup_openproject.sh. It is verified that the 'devops-automation' project exists, along with users 'alice.johnson' (Alice Johnson) and 'bob.smith' (Bob Smith). The expected labor rates ($125.00 and $85.00, respectively) are synthetic target values perfectly aligned with the agent's task description instructions.
